message:
test(cancellation): add telemetry counter tests [ft-3kxe.25]

- Add 10 inline unit tests for ShutdownCoordinator telemetry:
  initial zero, scopes registered, duplicates not counted,
  shutdowns requested, cascades, escalations, finalizer lifecycle,
  shutdown completed, serde roundtrip, combined operations
- Include proptest file with 12 unit tests + 5 property tests
  covering counter monotonicity, invariants, and serde roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
